{
  "contents": "export interface KnowledgeItem {\n  slug: string;\n  titleZh: string;\n  titleEn: string;\n  descZh: string;\n  descEn: string;\n  tagsZh: string[];\n  tagsEn: string[];\n  icon: string;\n  steps: number;\n}\n\nexport interface KnowledgeCategory {\n  id: string;\n  nameZh: string;\n  nameEn: string;\n  emoji: string;\n  items: KnowledgeItem[];\n}\n\nexport const KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES: KnowledgeCategory[] = [\n  {\n    id: \"react\",\n    nameZh: \"React\",\n    nameEn: \"React\",\n    emoji: \"⚛\",\n    items: [\n      {\n        slug: \"react-diff\",\n        titleZh: \"Diff 算法原理\",\n        titleEn: \"Diff Algorithm\",\n        descZh:\n          \"React 如何高效对比新旧 Virtual DOM？理解三大假设、同层比较策略与 key 的关键作用。\",\n        descEn:\n          \"How React efficiently diffs Virtual DOM trees. Three assumptions, same-level comparison, and the role of keys.\",\n        tagsZh: [\"6 步动画\", \"树结构可视化\", \"代码高亮\"],\n        tagsEn: [\"6-step animation\", \"tree visualization\", \"code highlight\"],\n        icon: \"🌳\",\n        steps: 6,\n      },\n    ],\n  },\n  {\n    id: \"javascript\",\n    nameZh: \"JavaScript\",\n    nameEn: \"JavaScript\",\n    emoji: \"🟡\",\n    items: [],\n  },\n  {\n    id: \"react-native\",\n    nameZh: \"React Native\",\n    nameEn: \"React Native\",\n    emoji: \"📱\",\n    items: [],\n  },\n  {\n    id: \"css\",\n    nameZh: \"CSS\",\n    nameEn: \"CSS\",\n    emoji: \"🎨\",\n    items: [],\n  },\n];\n\n/** 根据 slug 查找 item 及所属 category */\nexport function findKnowledgeItem(slug: string): {\n  item: KnowledgeItem;\n  category: KnowledgeCategory;\n} | null {\n  for (const category of KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES) {\n    const item = category.items.find((i) => i.slug === slug);\n    if (item) return { item, category };\n  }\n  return null;\n}\n\n/** 获取所有 slug（用于 generateStaticParams） */\nexport function getAllSlugs(): string[] {\n  return KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES.flatMap((c) => c.items.map((i) => i.slug));\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 82
}

  "contents": "import Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport type { KnowledgeItem } from \"@/lib/knowledge-data\";\n\ninterface KnowledgeCardProps {\n  item: KnowledgeItem;\n  locale: string;\n}\n\nexport function KnowledgeCard({ item, locale }: KnowledgeCardProps) {\n  return (\n    <Link\n      href={`/${locale}/knowledge/${item.slug}`}\n      className={cn(\n        \"group flex items-center gap-4 rounded-xl border border-border\",\n        \"bg-background p-5 transition-all duration-200\",\n        \"hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-hover hover:border-muted-foreground/30\"\n      )}\n    >\n      {/* 图标 */}\n      <div className=\"flex h-11 w-11 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary text-xl\">\n        {item.icon}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 内容 */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n        <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-text-primary mb-1\">\n          {locale === \"zh\" ? item.titleZh : item.titleEn}\n        </p>\n        <p className=\"text-xs text-text-secondary leading-relaxed mb-2 line-clamp-2\">\n          {locale === \"zh\" ? item.descZh : item.descEn}\n        </p>\n        <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-1.5\">\n          {(locale === \"zh\" ? item.tagsZh : item.tagsEn).map((tag) => (\n            <span\n              key={tag}\n              className=\"text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 rounded border border-border bg-background-secondary text-text-secondary\"\n            >\n              {tag}\n            </span>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 箭头 */}\n      <span className=\"text-border text-lg transition-colors group-hover:text-muted-foreground shrink-0\">\n        ›\n      </span>\n    </Link>\n  );\n}\n",

}

{
  "contents": "// components/knowledge/step-player.tsx\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n\nexport interface StepPlayerState {\n  currentStep: number;\n  totalSteps: number;\n  direction: \"forward\" | \"backward\";\n  goTo: (step: number) => void;\n  next: () => void;\n  prev: () => void;\n  isFirst: boolean;\n  isLast: boolean;\n}\n\nexport function useStepPlayer(totalSteps: number): StepPlayerState {\n  const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState(0);\n  const [direction, setDirection] = useState<\"forward\" | \"backward\">(\"forward\");\n\n  const goTo = useCallback(\n    (step: number) => {\n      if (step < 0 || step >= totalSteps) return;\n      setDirection(step > currentStep ? \"forward\" : \"backward\");\n      setCurrentStep(step);\n    },\n    [currentStep, totalSteps]\n  );\n\n  const next = useCallback(() => goTo(currentStep + 1), [currentStep, goTo]);\n  const prev = useCallback(() => goTo(currentStep - 1), [currentStep, goTo]);\n\n  return {\n    currentStep,\n    totalSteps,\n    direction,\n    goTo,\n    next,\n    prev,\n    isFirst: currentStep === 0,\n    isLast: currentStep === totalSteps - 1,\n  };\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 44
}

  "contents": "// components/knowledge/demo-shell.tsx\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { useTranslations } from \"next-intl\";\nimport type { ReactNode } from \"react\";\nimport type { StepPlayerState } from \"./step-player\";\n\nexport interface DemoStep {\n  labelZh: string;\n  labelEn: string;\n  content: ReactNode;\n}\n\ninterface DemoShellProps {\n  locale: string;\n  categoryEmoji: string;\n  categoryName: string;\n  titleZh: string;\n  titleEn: string;\n  steps: DemoStep[];\n  player: StepPlayerState;\n  backHref: string;\n}\n\nexport function DemoShell({\n  locale,\n  categoryEmoji,\n  categoryName,\n  titleZh,\n  titleEn,\n  steps,\n  player,\n  backHref,\n}: DemoShellProps) {\n  const t = useTranslations(\"knowledge\");\n  const { currentStep, goTo, next, prev, isFirst, isLast } = player;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-[calc(100vh-64px)] flex-col overflow-hidden\">\n      {/* 顶栏 */}\n      <div className=\"flex h-13 shrink-0 items-center gap-4 border-b border-border px-6\">\n        <Link\n          href={backHref}\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border bg-background-secondary px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-text-secondary transition-colors hover:text-text-primary\"\n        >\n          ← {t(\"backToList\")}\n        </Link>\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-text-secondary\">\n          <span>{categoryEmoji} {categoryName}</span>\n          <span className=\"text-border\">›</span>\n          <span className=\"font-semibold text-text-primary\">\n            {locale === \"zh\" ? titleZh : titleEn}\n          </span>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 主体：步骤导航 + 内容 */}\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* 左侧步骤导航 */}\n        <nav className=\"w-44 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto border-r border-border px-3 py-5\">\n          <p className=\"mb-3 px-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">\n            {t(\"steps\")}\n          </p>\n          <ol className=\"space-y-0.5\">\n            {steps.map((step, i) => (\n              <li key={i}>\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => goTo(i)}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"flex w-full items-start gap-2.5 rounded-lg p-2 text-left transition-colors\",\n                    i === currentStep\n                      ? \"bg-background-secondary\"\n                      : \"hover:bg-background-secondary\"\n                  )}\n                >\n                  <span\n                    className={cn(\n                      \"mt-0.5 flex h-5 w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full border text-[9px] font-semibold transition-all\",\n                      i < currentStep\n                        ? \"border-green-500 bg-green-500 text-white\"\n                        : i === currentStep\n                        ? \"border-text-primary bg-text-primary text-background\"\n                        : \"border-border text-text-secondary\"\n                    )}\n                  >\n                    {i < currentStep ? \"✓\" : i + 1}\n                  </span>\n                  <span\n                    className={cn(\n                      \"text-[11px] leading-snug\",\n                      i === currentStep\n                        ? \"font-medium text-text-primary\"\n                        : \"text-text-secondary\"\n                    )}\n                  >\n                    {locale === \"zh\" ? step.labelZh : step.labelEn}\n                  </span>\n                </button>\n              </li>\n            ))}\n          </ol>\n        </nav>\n\n        {/* 演示内容区 */}\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto\">\n          {steps[currentStep]?.content}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 底部步进控制 */}\n      <div className=\"flex h-15 shrink-0 items-center justify-between border-t border-border px-8\">\n        <button\n          onClick={prev}\n          disabled={isFirst}\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-border px-4 py-2 text-xs transition-all\",\n            isFirst\n              ? \"cursor-not-allowed opacity-40 text-text-secondary\"\n              : \"text-text-secondary hover:border-muted-foreground/50 hover:text-text-primary\"\n          )}\n        >\n          ← {t(\"prevStep\")}\n        </button>\n\n        {/* 进度点 */}\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\n          {steps.map((_, i) => (\n            <button\n              key={i}\n              onClick={() => goTo(i)}\n              className={cn(\n                \"h-1.5 rounded-full transition-all duration-200\",\n                i < currentStep\n                  ? \"w-1.5 bg-green-500\"\n                  : i === currentStep\n                  ? \"w-5 bg-text-primary\"\n                  : \"w-1.5 bg-border\"\n              )}\n            />\n          ))}\n        </div>\n\n        <button\n          onClick={next}\n          disabled={isLast}\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-xs transition-all\",\n            isLast\n              ? \"cursor-not-allowed opacity-40 border border-border text-text-secondary\"\n              : \"bg-text-primary text-background hover:opacity-85\"\n          )}\n        >\n          {t(\"nextStep\")} →\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

}

}

  "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst jsCode = `// Virtual DOM 本质上是一个 JS 对象\nconst vdom = {\n  type: \"div\",\n  props: { className: \"container\" },\n  children: [\n    {\n      type: \"h1\",\n      props: {},\n      children: [\"Hello, React!\"],\n    },\n    {\n      type: \"p\",\n      props: { id: \"desc\" },\n      children: [\"这是一段描述\"],\n    },\n  ],\n};`;\n\nexport function Step1Vdom({ isActive }: Props) {\n  const anim = isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown\" : \"opacity-0\";\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n      <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n        <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 1 / 6</p>\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">什么是 Virtual DOM？</h2>\n        <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-md text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n          Virtual DOM 是真实 DOM 的轻量 JS 对象描述。React 先在内存中对比两棵 VNode 树，再将最小差异批量更新到真实 DOM。\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"flex w-full max-w-2xl items-start gap-6\">\n        {/* JS 对象 */}\n        <div className={cn(\"flex-1\", anim)} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>\n          <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">JS 对象（VNode）</p>\n          <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n            <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"var(--secondary-bg)\" }}>\n              {jsCode}\n            </SyntaxHighlighter>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 箭头 */}\n        <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col items-center gap-1 pt-12 text-text-secondary\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.3s\" }}>\n          <span className=\"text-xl\">⟶</span>\n          <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary\">render</span>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 真实 DOM */}\n        <div className={cn(\"flex-1\", anim)} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.4s\" }}>\n          <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">真实 DOM</p>\n          <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary p-4 font-mono text-xs text-text-secondary space-y-1 leading-6\">\n            <div><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;div</span> <span className=\"text-amber-600\">class</span>=<span className=\"text-green-600\">&quot;container&quot;</span><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&gt;</span></div>\n            <div className=\"pl-4\"><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;h1&gt;</span>Hello, React!<span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;/h1&gt;</span></div>\n            <div className=\"pl-4\"><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;p</span> <span className=\"text-amber-600\">id</span>=<span className=\"text-green-600\">&quot;desc&quot;</span><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&gt;</span>这是一段描述<span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;/p&gt;</span></div>\n            <div><span className=\"text-blue-500\">&lt;/div&gt;</span></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

}

{
  "contents": "import { notFound } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport type { Metadata } from \"next\";\nimport { findKnowledgeItem, getAllSlugs } from \"@/lib/knowledge-data\";\nimport { DEMO_REGISTRY } from \"@/components/knowledge/demos/_registry\";\n\ninterface PageProps {\n  params: { locale: string; slug: string };\n}\n\nexport async function generateStaticParams() {\n  return getAllSlugs().map((slug) => ({ slug }));\n}\n\nexport async function generateMetadata({ params }: PageProps): Promise<Metadata> {\n  const found = findKnowledgeItem(params.slug);\n  if (!found) return {};\n  const { item } = found;\n  return {\n    title: params.locale === \"zh\" ? item.titleZh : item.titleEn,\n    description: params.locale === \"zh\" ? item.descZh : item.descEn,\n  };\n}\n\nexport default async function KnowledgeDemoPage({ params }: PageProps) {\n  const found = findKnowledgeItem(params.slug);\n  if (!found) notFound();\n\n  const demoLoader = DEMO_REGISTRY[params.slug];\n  if (!demoLoader) notFound();\n\n  const { default: DemoComponent } = await demoLoader();\n\n  return (\n    <DemoComponent\n      locale={params.locale}\n      backHref={`/${params.locale}/knowledge`}\n    />\n  );\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 40
}

\"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 3 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">类型不同 → 直接替换</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            节点类型（tag 名）改变时，React 不会尝试复用，直接卸载整棵旧子树，挂载新子树。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex w-full max-w-xl flex-col gap-6\">\n          {/* 场景 A：类型相同 */}\n          <div className={cn(\n            \"rounded-xl border border-green-200 bg-green-50 p-4 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-950\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.5s\" }}>\n            <p className=\"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-red-700 dark:text-red-400\">❌ 类型不同 — 销毁重建</p>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 font-mono text-sm\">\n              <span className={cn(\n                \"rounded border border-red-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-red-600\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__flipOutX\" : \"\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.8s\" }}>&lt;div&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-text-secondary\">→</span>\n              <span className={cn(\n                \"rounded border border-amber-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-amber-700\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__flipInX\" : \"\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}>&lt;span&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-xs text-red-600\">整棵子树卸载 + 重新挂载</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 警告提示 */}\n          <div className={cn(\n            \"rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary p-3 text-xs text-text-secondary\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.4s\" }}>\n            ⚠️ 因此，不要用条件渲染在同位置切换不同组件类型，会触发整棵子树的卸载（state 丢失、动画中断）。\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"transparent\" }}>\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

{
  "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst code = `// 无 key — React 按索引对比，全部更新\n<ul>\n  <li>Apple</li>  {/* index 0 */}\n  <li>Banana</li> {/* index 1 */}\n</ul>\n\n// 有 key — React 按 key 对比，精准复用\n<ul>\n  <li key=\"a\">Apple</li>\n  <li key=\"b\">Banana</li>\n</ul>\n\n// 新增 Orange 到头部\n// 无 key：全部节点更新（3 次 DOM 操作）\n// 有 key：仅插入 Orange（1 次 DOM 操作）`;\n\nconst items = [\n  { key: \"a\", label: \"🍎 Apple\" },\n  { key: \"b\", label: \"🍌 Banana\" },\n  { key: \"c\", label: \"🍊 Orange\" },\n] as const;\n\nexport function Step4Key({ isActive }: Props) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full gap-0\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-8 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n        <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 4 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">key 的作用</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            key 帮助 React 识别同层列表中哪些节点是同一个，从而精准复用，避免不必要的 DOM 操作。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex w-full max-w-xl gap-6\">\n          {/* 无 key */}\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <p className={cn(\n              \"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-red-600\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>❌ 无 key — 按索引</p>\n            <div className=\"space-y-1.5\">\n              {items.map((item, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={item.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-700\",\n                    \"dark:border-red-900 dark:bg-red-950 dark:text-red-400\",\n                    isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${0.2 + i * 0.15}s` }}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">index={i}</span>\n                  {item.label}\n                </div>\n              ))}\n              <p className={cn(\n                \"text-[10px] text-red-500 mt-1\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.7s\" }}>\n                头部插入 → 3 个节点全部更新\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 有 key */}\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <p className={cn(\n              \"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-green-600\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>✅ 有 key — 精准匹配</p>\n            <div className=\"space-y-1.5\">\n              {/* 新增的 Orange */}\n              <div\n                className={cn(\n                  \"rounded-lg border border-amber-300 bg-amber-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-amber-700\",\n                  \"dark:border-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400\",\n                  isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__bounceIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                )}\n                style={{ animationDelay: \"0.9s\" }}\n              >\n                <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">key=&quot;c&quot; 🆕</span>\n                🍊 Orange\n              </div>\n              {/* 复用的 Apple & Banana */}\n              {items.slice(0, 2).map((item, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={item.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-green-700\",\n                    \"dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-950 dark:text-green-400\",\n                    isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${0.3 + i * 0.15}s` }}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">key=&quot;{item.key}&quot; ♻️</span>\n                  {item.label}\n                </div>\n              ))}\n              <p className={cn(\n                \"text-[10px] text-green-600 mt-1\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}>\n                头部插入 → 仅 Orange 新建，其余复用\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"jsx\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"transparent\" }}>\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

{
  "contents": "// components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/step-5-list-diff.tsx\n\"use client\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst code = `// React 列表 Diff 两轮策略\n// 第一轮：顺序扫描，处理头部连续可复用节点\n// 第二轮：建 key Map，O(1) 查找乱序可复用节点\n\nfunction reconcileChildrenArray(\n  returnFiber, currentFirstChild, newChildren\n) {\n  let oldFiber = currentFirstChild;\n  let newIdx = 0;\n\n  // 第一轮：头部顺序扫描\n  for (; oldFiber && newIdx < newChildren.length; newIdx++) {\n    const newChild = newChildren[newIdx];\n    if (!canReuseNode(oldFiber, newChild)) break;\n    placeChild(updateSlot(oldFiber, newChild), newIdx);\n    oldFiber = oldFiber.sibling;\n  }\n\n  // 第二轮：用 Map 处理乱序节点\n  const existingChildren = mapRemainingChildren(oldFiber);\n  for (; newIdx < newChildren.length; newIdx++) {\n    const matchedFiber = existingChildren.get(\n      newChildren[newIdx].key ?? newIdx\n    );\n    // 找到可复用节点或新建\n  }\n}`;\n\nconst oldNodes = [\"A\", \"B\", \"C\", \"D\"] as const;\nconst newOrder = [\n  { key: \"A\", status: \"reuse\" as const },\n  { key: \"D\", status: \"move\" as const },\n  { key: \"B\", status: \"reuse\" as const },\n  { key: \"E\", status: \"new\" as const },\n];\n\nconst statusStyle: Record<string, string> = {\n  reuse: \"border-green-400 bg-green-50 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-950 dark:text-green-400\",\n  move: \"border-blue-400 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-950 dark:text-blue-400\",\n  new: \"border-amber-400 bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400\",\n};\n\nexport function Step5ListDiff({ isActive }: Props) {\n  const [phase, setPhase] = useState(0);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full gap-0\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n        <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 5 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">列表 Diff 优化</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            React 用顺序扫描 + key Map 两轮策略，在 O(n) 时间内完成列表节点的复用匹配。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 旧列表 */}\n        <div className=\"w-full max-w-md\">\n          <p className={cn(\n            \"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )}>旧列表</p>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n            {oldNodes.map((n, i) => (\n              <div\n                key={n}\n                className={cn(\n                  \"flex h-10 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-border\",\n                  \"bg-background-secondary font-mono text-sm font-bold text-text-primary\",\n                  isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                )}\n                style={{ animationDelay: `${0.1 + i * 0.1}s` }}\n              >\n                {n}\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 步骤按钮 */}\n        <div className={cn(\n          \"flex gap-3\",\n          isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n        )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.6s\" }}>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setPhase(1)}\n            className={cn(\n              \"rounded-lg border border-border px-3 py-1.5 text-xs transition-all hover:border-muted-foreground/50\",\n              phase >= 1 ? \"bg-text-primary text-background\" : \"text-text-secondary\"\n            )}\n          >\n            第一轮：顺序扫描\n          </button>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setPhase(2)}\n            className={cn(\n              \"rounded-lg border border-border px-3 py-1.5 text-xs transition-all hover:border-muted-foreground/50\",\n              phase >= 2 ? \"bg-text-primary text-background\" : \"text-text-secondary\"\n            )}\n          >\n            第二轮：key Map 匹配\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 新列表结果（第二阶段出现） */}\n        {phase >= 2 && (\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-md\">\n            <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">新列表（结果）</p>\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2 flex-wrap\">\n              {newOrder.map((n, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={n.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"flex h-10 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border font-mono text-sm font-bold\",\n                    statusStyle[n.status],\n                    \"animate__animated animate__bounceIn\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${i * 0.12}s` }}\n                >\n                  {n.key}\n                  <span className=\"ml-0.5 text-[8px]\">\n                    {n.status === \"new\" ? \"🆕\" : n.status === \"move\" ? \"↕\" : \"♻\"}\n                  </span>\n                </div>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-2 flex gap-4 text-[10px] text-text-secondary\">\n              <span>♻ 原地复用</span>\n              <span>↕ 移动复用</span>\n              <span>🆕 新建</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"10px\", background: \"transparent\" }}>\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

Web UI 中跨层级移动操作极少 → 只做同层比较\n// 2. 类型不同的组件生成不同结构 → 直接替换\n// 3. 开发者用 key 标识同层节点 → key 驱动列表优化\n\n// 整体时间复杂度：O(n)（传统 diff 是 O(n³)）`;\n\nexport function Step6Summary({ isActive }: Props) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full flex-col items-center overflow-y-auto px-8 py-10\">\n      <div className={cn(\n        \"mb-8 text-center\",\n        isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n      )}>\n        <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 6 / 6</p>\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">完整流程回顾</h2>\n        <p className=\"mt-2 text-sm text-text-secondary\">React Diff 的三大假设 + 五个核心策略</p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"grid w-full max-w-2xl grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 mb-8\">\n        {summaryPoints.map((p, i) => (\n          <div\n            key={p.title}\n            className={cn(\n              \"rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary p-4\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInUp\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )}\n            style={{ animationDelay: `${0.1 + i * 0.1}s` }}\n          >\n            <div className=\"mb-2 text-xl\">{p.icon}</div>\n            <p className=\"mb-1 text-sm font-semibold text-text-primary\">{p.title}</p>\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">{p.desc}</p>\n          </div>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      <div className={cn(\n        \"w-full max-w-2xl rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden\",\n        isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInUp\" : \"opacity-0\"\n      )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.7s\" }}>\n        <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"12px\", background: \"var(--secondary-bg)\" }}>\n          {finalCode}\n        </SyntaxHighlighter>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #31 (Agent)

_2026-05-01 08:57:10Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> Now I have a comprehensive view of the entire Knowledge module implementation. Let me analyze each aspect:
>
> ## Architecture
>
> **Component Layering:**
> - `lib/knowledge-data.ts` - Pure data layer, no React dependencies. Good.
> - `components/knowledge/knowledge-card.tsx` - Server component (no "use client"). Takes locale as prop. Good.
> - `components/knowledge/knowledge-sidebar.tsx` - "use client" for onClick event. Correct.
> - `components/knowledge/knowledge-list.tsx` - "use client" for useState. Correct.
> - `components/knowledge/step-player.tsx` - "use client" for useState/useCallback. 
> - `components/knowledge/demo-shell.tsx` - "use client" for useTranslations. Correct.
> - `components/knowledge/demos/_registry.ts` - No "use client", just a pure registry. Correct.
> - `components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/index.tsx` - "use client" for useStepPlayer. Correct.
> - All step files - "use client" for animations. Correct.
> - `app/[locale]/knowledge/page.tsx` - Server component. Correct.
> - `app/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]/page.tsx` - Server component with dynamic rendering. The component structure looks solid with proper separation between server and client boundaries, and the hook file is correctly marked as a client component for its animation logic. The Server Component can render a Client Component, which is valid in Next.js—the real question is whether the dynamic import pattern works correctly. When `demoLoader()` resolves to a module with a Client Component as the default export, Next.js should handle the boundary properly and treat it as a client component at runtime.
>
> However, there's a potential issue with code splitting: static imports of client components in server components get bundled for the client automatically, but dynamic imports resolved at runtime might bypass that optimization. Since this is pre-rendered at build time with `generateStaticParams`, the bundling behavior could differ from what I'd expect in a typical server-rendered scenario.
>
> The dynamic import pattern with `await import(...)` should work in Next.js App Router and create separate client bundles per demo, though some versions might prefer using `next/dynamic` instead. The registry design itself is solid—mapping slugs to dynamic import functions enables good code splitting and extensibility, though the `then(m => ({ default: m.ReactDiffDemo }))` pattern is a bit unconventional since the index already exports that component.
>
> The real performance concern is importing all of animate.css globally—it adds ~70KB of CSS when the React Diff demo only uses a fraction of those classes. Scoping it to just the knowledge pages would be better, though for a personal blog this tradeoff might be acceptable. There's also a potential naming conflict risk, though the `animate__*` prefix makes it unlikely.
>
> For i18n, there's a mixed approach between `useTranslations` for UI strings and locale prop drilling for data from `knowledge-data.ts`. The critical issue is that the step components are hardcoded in Chinese and don't receive a locale prop, so the English version would show Chinese content even though `DemoShell` correctly switches the step labels by locale. JSX—the Step components receive only `isActive`, not `locale`. This is a significant issue: all step content (headings, descriptions, card texts) is hardcoded in Chinese. For example in `step-1-vdom.tsx`, strings like `"步骤 1 / 6"`, `"什么是 Virtual DOM？"`, and the full description are all in Chinese, along with labels like `"JS 对象（VNode）"` and `"真实 DOM"`. The same problem exists across all other steps—only the sidebar step labels have bilingual support through `labelZh` and `labelEn`, but the actual step content remains Chinese-only, which is a critical blocker for English i18n.
>
> On the TypeScript side, the types are solid and `step-player.tsx` properly exports the `StepPlayerState` interface. There's a minor safety concern in `demo-shell.tsx` where a non-null assertion is used on the active category lookup—it works because the initial ID is always valid, but it could fail at runtime if an invalid ID somehow gets passed in. **Code Quality:**
> - Step numbering is hardcoded throughout each step component, so any reordering or count changes requires manual updates everywhere.
> - There's a minor redundancy in `_registry.ts` where the dynamic import wraps an already-exported default, adding an unnecessary layer.
> - The `"use client"` directive on `step-player.tsx` is technically unnecessary since the client boundary exists at the component level, but it doesn't hurt and makes the intent explicit.
> - The step count is hardcoded as `useStepPlayer(6)` instead of deriving from the actual steps array length.
>
> **Navigation:**
> - The navigation component has some commented-out sections, but these appear to be pre-existing rather than part of the recent changes—the main addition was the Knowledge entry to `navLinks`.
>
> **Mobile:**
> - Still examining the mobile-specific considerations... Looking at the accessibility issues, the progress dots and navigation buttons lack proper ARIA labels and attributes that screen readers need. The syntax highlighter is also hardcoded to a light theme, so it won't adapt to dark mode and will look jarring. Most critically, all the step content is in hardcoded Chinese, which makes this demo inaccessible to non-Chinese speakers.
>
> For the `generateStaticParams` issue, the function only returns the slug parameter but doesn't account for the locale segment in the `[locale]/[slug]` route structure. In Next.js App Router, nested routes need to return params for their own segment, but the parent locale segment should either be handled by a parent `generateStaticParams` or the locale needs to be included here as well.
>
> Actually, thinking about this more carefully — if the parent `[locale]/layout.tsx` already has `generateStaticParams` returning all locales, and the child `[slug]/page.tsx` returns all slugs, Next.js will combine these to generate all locale-slug combinations. That's the correct pattern.
>
> Looking at the issues I've found, the critical problems are: the step content is entirely hardcoded in Chinese so English users see Chinese regardless of their locale, the global `animate.css` import adds significant overhead to every page when it's only needed for knowledge pages, the syntax highlighter theme doesn't respond to dark mode changes, the interactive state in the step components doesn't reset when navigating between steps, and the knowledge pages lack mobile responsiveness with the sidebar layout breaking on smaller screens.
>
> Beyond those, there are several smaller issues: the registry has unnecessary wrapper logic around default exports, the step count is hardcoded instead of calculated from the array length, step numbers are hardcoded per component making them fragile to reordering, there's an unguarded non-null assertion on `activeCategory`, the `useStepPlayer` hook doesn't need the `"use client"` directive, the progress buttons lack accessibility labels, and the locale conditional pattern is scattered throughout the code instead of being centralized.
>
> The module can't be merged in its current state because the step content isn't localized—that's a blocker. The issues with animate.css, dark mode support, and mobile responsiveness also need fixing before this goes to production. Though I should double-check whether the spec actually required i18n for step content specifically, since the severity might depend on whether this is meant to be a Chinese-first release or truly bilingual from the start.

</details>

{
  "contents": "# Knowledge 模块设计规格\r\n\r\n**日期**：2026-05-01  \r\n**状态**：已批准\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 一、目标\r\n\r\n在现有 Home / Articles / Resume 基础上，新增 **Knowledge** 模块。该模块以可视化动画演示前端技术原理（首个知识点：React Diff 算法），让访问者通过交互式步进演示深入理解底层实现。\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 二、布局方案（C2）\r\n\r\n### 列表页 `/[locale]/knowledge`\r\n\r\n```\r\n┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐\r\n│  导航栏（复用现有 Navigation 组件）              │\r\n├────────────┬─────────────────────────────────┤\r\n│            │  React                          │\r\n│  ⚛ React  │  React 核心原理，通过动画可视化    │\r\n│  🟡 JS    │  ┌─────────────────────────────┐ │\r\n│  📱 RN    │  │ 🌳  Diff 算法原理            │ │\r\n│  🎨 CSS   │  │    描述 · 标签               │ │\r\n│           │  └─────────────────────────────┘ │\r\n└────────────┴─────────────────────────────────┘\r\n```\r\n\r\n- **左侧**：固定分类侧边栏，宽 200px，含分类 emoji + 名称 + 知识点数量徽章\r\n- **右侧**：当前分类的知识点列表，含图标、标题、描述、标签（步骤数 / 动画类型）\r\n- 点击知识点跳转到演示路由\r\n\r\n### 演示页 `/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]`\r\n\r\n```\r\n┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\r\n│  ← 返回   ⚛ React › Diff 算法原理                 │\r\n├──────────┬──────────────────────────┬─────────────┤\r\n│          │                          │             │\r\n│ 步骤导航 │    可视化动画区域          │  代码面板   │\r\n│ (竖排)  │    (animate.css 驱动)    │  (代码高亮) │\r\n│          │                          │             │\r\n├──────────┴──────────────────────────┴─────────────┤\r\n│  ← 上一步        ●●○○○○        下一步 →           │\r\n└──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\r\n```\r\n\r\n- **左列**：步骤导航（竖排），可点击跳转，已完成步骤显示绿色 ✓\r\n- **中列**：知识点专属可视化组件，animate.css 驱动入场/切换动画\r\n- **右列**：对应步骤的代码高亮面板（固定 300px）\r\n- **底部**：上一步 / 下一步按钮 + 进度圆点\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 三、数据结构\r\n\r\n知识点元数据**硬编码**在 `lib/knowledge-data.ts`，**不走数据库**。每个知识点的演示内容写在独立的 React 组件中。\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\n// lib/knowledge-data.ts\r\nexport type KnowledgeItem = {\r\n  slug: string;          // URL slug，如 \"react-diff\"\r\n  titleZh: string;\r\n  titleEn: string;\r\n  descZh: string;\r\n  descEn: string;\r\n  tags: string[];        // 如 [\"6 步动画\", \"树结构可视化\"]\r\n  icon: string;          // emoji\r\n  steps: number;         // 步骤总数\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport type KnowledgeCategory = {\r\n  id: string;            // 如 \"react\"\r\n  nameZh: string;\r\n  nameEn: string;\r\n  emoji: string;\r\n  items: KnowledgeItem[];\r\n};\r\n\r\nexport const KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES: KnowledgeCategory[] = [\r\n  {\r\n    id: \"react\",\r\n    nameZh: \"React\",\r\n    nameEn: \"React\",\r\n    emoji: \"⚛\",\r\n    items: [\r\n      {\r\n        slug: \"react-diff\",\r\n        titleZh: \"Diff 算法原理\",\r\n        titleEn: \"Diff Algorithm\",\r\n        descZh: \"React 如何高效对比新旧 Virtual DOM？理解三大假设、同层比较策略与 key 的关键作用。\",\r\n        descEn: \"How React efficiently diffs Virtual DOM trees. Understanding the three assumptions, same-level comparison, and the role of keys.\",\r\n        tags: [\"6 步动画\", \"树结构可视化\", \"代码高亮\"],\r\n        icon: \"🌳\",\r\n        steps: 6,\r\n      },\r\n    ],\r\n  },\r\n  { id: \"javascript\", nameZh: \"JavaScript\", nameEn: \"JavaScript\", emoji: \"🟡\", items: [] },\r\n  { id: \"react-native\", nameZh: \"React Native\", nameEn: \"React Native\", emoji: \"📱\", items: [] },\r\n  { id: \"css\", nameZh: \"CSS\", nameEn: \"CSS\", emoji: \"🎨\", items: [] },\r\n];\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 四、文件结构\r\n\r\n```\r\napp/[locale]/knowledge/\r\n  page.tsx                      # 列表页（Server Component）\r\n  [slug]/\r\n    page.tsx                    # 演示路由页（Server Component，渲染对应演示）\r\n\r\ncomponents/knowledge/\r\n  knowledge-layout.tsx          # C2 双栏布局（Client）\r\n  knowledge-sidebar.tsx         # 左侧分类侧边栏（Client）\r\n  knowledge-list.tsx            # 右侧知识点列表（Client）\r\n  knowledge-card.tsx            # 单个知识点卡片\r\n  demo-shell.tsx                # 演示页外壳（顶栏 + 步骤导航 + 底部控制）\r\n  step-player.tsx               # 步进控制逻辑（useStepPlayer hook）\r\n  demos/\r\n    react-diff/\r\n      index.tsx                 # React Diff 演示入口（注册 6 个步骤）\r\n      step-1-vdom.tsx           # 什么是 Virtual DOM\r\n      step-2-same-level.tsx     # 同层比较策略（animate.css 树动画）\r\n      step-3-type-diff.tsx      # 类型不同直接替换\r\n      step-4-key.tsx            # key 的作用\r\n      step-5-list-diff.tsx      # 列表 Diff 优化\r\n      step-6-summary.tsx        # 完整流程回顾（代码总览）\r\n    _registry.ts                # { slug → 演示组件 } 映射表\r\n\r\nlib/\r\n  knowledge-data.ts             # 知识点元数据\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 五、React Diff 演示内容规划（6 步）\r\n\r\n| 步骤 | 标题 | 可视化方式 | 动画技术 |\r\n|------|------|-----------|---------|\r\n| 1 | 什么是 Virtual DOM | JS 对象 ↔ DOM 树对比图 | animate.css `fadeInDown` |\r\n| 2 | 同层比较策略 | 新旧树节点颜色对比（绿=复用，红=销毁，橙=新增） | animate.css `fadeInDown` + `shakeX` + `bounceIn` |\r\n| 3 | 类型不同直接替换 | `<div>` → `<span>` 动画替换 | animate.css `flipOutX` / `flipInX` |\r\n| 4 | key 的作用 | 无 key vs 有 key 的列表 reorder 对比 | animate.css `slideInLeft` + 位置交换 |\r\n| 5 | 列表 Diff 优化 | 双指针扫描动画（头头/尾尾/头尾/key 映射） | CSS position transition + animate.css `fadeIn` |\r\n| 6 | 完整流程回顾 | 代码路径高亮 + 流程图 | animate.css `fadeIn` 逐行高亮 |\r\n\r\n每个步骤组件接收 `{ isActive: boolean; direction: \"forward\" | \"backward\" }` props，`isActive` 为 true 时触发入场动画类。\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 六、依赖\r\n\r\n| 包 | 用途 | 安装方式 |\r\n|----|------|---------|\r\n| `animate.css` | 节点入场/切换动画 | `npm install animate.css` |\r\n| `react-syntax-highlighter` | 代码面板语法高亮 | `npm install react-syntax-highlighter @types/react-syntax-highlighter` |\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 七、导航栏 & i18n 更新\r\n\r\n- `components/navigation.tsx`：navLinks 数组新增 `{ href: '/${locale}/knowledge', label: t('knowledge') }`\r\n- `messages/zh.json`：`\"nav\": { ..., \"knowledge\": \"知识库\" }`\r\n- `messages/en.json`：`\"nav\": { ..., \"knowledge\": \"Knowledge\" }`\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 八、主题规范\r\n\r\n- 完全复用现有 CSS 变量：`--bg-color`、`--secondary-bg`、`--text-primary`、`--text-secondary`、`--border-color`\r\n- 演示页可视化中的状态色：\r\n  - 复用节点：`#22c55e`（绿）\r\n  - 销毁节点：`#ef4444`（红）\r\n  - 新增节点：`#f59e0b`（橙）\r\n  - 这三种颜色**仅出现在演示可视化区域**，不影响整体 UI 风格\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 九、路由与 i18n\r\n\r\n- 遵循现有 `app/[locale]/` 结构\r\n- 演示路由：`/zh/knowledge/react-diff`、`/en/knowledge/react-diff`\r\n- `generateStaticParams` 根据 `KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES` 生成所有 slug\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 十、不在本次范围内\r\n\r\n- 后台管理界面\r\n- 搜索功能\r\n- 用户评论 / 收藏\r\n- 移动端侧边栏折叠（下一个知识点迭代时处理）\r\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #35 (Agent)

_2026-05-01 08:58:19Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> Now I have a comprehensive view. Let me also note some important observations from the spec:
>
> 1. The spec says step components should receive `{ isActive: boolean; direction: "forward" | "backward" }` props - but the implementation only passes `isActive`, not `direction`. The `direction` was supposed to allow different animations for forward vs backward navigation.
>
> 2. The spec says `tags: string[]` (a single tags array) but the implementation has `tagsZh: string[]` and `tagsEn: string[]` (separate arrays for each locale). This is a deviation from the spec.
>
> 3. The spec says `knowledge-layout.tsx` should exist as a separate file, but the implementation merged it into `knowledge-list.tsx`. 
>
> Mobile responsiveness is explicitly out of scope according to the spec, so that's not a concern. The missing `direction` prop is actually a real issue since it was part of the animation design. As for the Chinese hardcoding in step components - the spec supports both locales at `/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]`, and while it doesn't explicitly mandate bilingual step content, the i18n requirements suggest it should be.
>
> Looking at the implementation more closely, the `KnowledgeItem` type has separate `tagsZh` and `tagsEn` fields, which is actually an improvement beyond what the spec defines with its single `tags` field. But there's a more critical gap: the `direction` prop isn't being passed to step components at all, even though the spec specifies they should receive `{ isActive: boolean; direction: "forward" | "backward" }` - this means the backward animation logic won't work properly. The syntax highlighter uses a light theme that won't adapt to dark mode, breaking code block visibility in dark themes. There are also several smaller issues: the step registry has redundant imports, the step player hardcodes the total step count instead of deriving it from the data, step numbers are hardcoded per component making them brittle to changes, there's an unnecessary non-null assertion on `activeCategory`, and the `useStepPlayer` hook has a `"use client"` directive that isn't needed. The `phase` state in the list diff step also doesn't reset when navigating away and back.
>
> Looking at the remaining issues, the progress dot buttons lack accessibility labels, the tags structure deviates from the spec by splitting into language-specific variants without documentation, and the locale selection logic is scattered across components instead of being centralized. The critical problems are the hardcoded Chinese content breaking English, the missing direction prop that's spec-defined, the global animate.css import affecting performance, and the dark mode styling defect on an already-released theme — these should all be addressed before merging.

</details>

## Knowledge 模块代码审查报告

**审查范围**：`d:\geekiblog\.worktrees\knowledge`，分支 `feature/knowledge-module`  
**审查时间**：2026-05-01

---

### 优点

**架构设计清晰**  
数据层（`knowledge-data.ts`）、UI 层（components）、路由层（app）三层分离干净。`DEMO_REGISTRY` 的 slug → 动态导入模式天然支持 code splitting，扩展新知识点只需两步：在 `knowledge-data.ts` 注册元数据 + 在 `_registry.ts` 加一行，设计合理。

**Server/Client 边界正确**  
`page.tsx` 保持纯 Server Component，包含状态交互的 `KnowledgeList`、`KnowledgeSidebar`、step 组件均正确标注 `"use client"`；`KnowledgeCard` 无需状态因此保持 Server，分层无误。

**`useStepPlayer` Hook 设计好**  
接口干净，`direction` 状态、`isFirst`/`isLast` 衍生值、`goTo`/`next`/`prev` 包装——对外暴露的 `StepPlayerState` 形状完整，消费方 `demo-shell.tsx` 直接结构解构，零重复。

**`KnowledgeData` 类型扩展**  
相对于 spec 定义的单一 `tags: string[]`，实现拆分为 `tagsZh`/`tagsEn`，是有意义的改进，保证了列表页标签也支持双语。

**步骤可视化质量**  
`step-2-same-level.tsx` 的 `VNode` 小组件抽取、`step-5-list-diff.tsx` 的状态色 Map 用法，代码都很整洁；animate.css 延迟动画用 `animationDelay` inline style 分层入场，视觉节奏好。

---

### 问题

#### 🔴 Critical

**C1：步骤内容全部硬编码为中文，英文路由不可用**

所有 6 个 step 组件只接收 `{ isActive: boolean }`，没有 `locale` prop。访问 `/en/knowledge/react-diff` 时，步骤内所有标题、说明、标签文字均为中文。

```26:33:../.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/step-1-vdom.tsx
export function Step1Vdom({ isActive }: Props) {
  const anim = isActive ? "animate__animated animate__fadeInDown" : "opacity-0";
  return (
    <div ...>
      <div ...>
        <p ...>步骤 1 / 6</p>          {/* 硬编码中文 */}
        <h2 ...>什么是 Virtual DOM？</h2> {/* 硬编码中文 */}
```

Spec 第九节明确列出了 `/en/knowledge/react-diff` 路由，i18n 是功能性要求，不是优化项。

**C2：`direction` prop 未传递给步骤组件**

Spec 第五节明确规定步骤组件接收 `{ isActive: boolean; direction: "forward" | "backward" }`，用于区分前进/后退动画。`useStepPlayer` 已正确追踪 `direction`，但 `index.tsx` 完全没有将其传给任何 step：

```17:52:../.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/index.tsx
export function ReactDiffDemo({ locale, backHref }: Props) {
  const player = useStepPlayer(6);
  const { currentStep } = player;   // direction 被忽略

  const steps: DemoStep[] = [
    {
      content: <Step1Vdom isActive={currentStep === 0} />,  // 无 direction
```

这是 spec 定义的特性遗漏，后退时动画方向与前进相同。

---

#### 🟠 Important

**I1：`animate.css` 全局导入会影响所有页面性能**

```1:1:../.worktrees/knowledge/app/globals.css
@import "animate.css";
```

animate.css v4 未压缩约 78KB，压缩后 ~16KB。这个 import 在 `globals.css` 顶部，意味着访问首页、文章页、简历页时都会加载。项目里只有知识模块 ~15 个 CSS class 真正用到（`fadeIn`、`bounceIn`、`shakeX` 等）。应该改为在 `[slug]/page.tsx` 对应的 layout 或 CSS module 中局部引入，或通过 PurgeCSS 配置白名单。

**I2：`SyntaxHighlighter` 硬编码 `oneLight` 主题，深色模式下代码块异常**

所有 6 个 step 组件都使用：
```typescript
import { oneLight } from "react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism";
// ...
<SyntaxHighlighter style={oneLight} ...>
```

深色模式下代码块会强制显示浅色背景，与整体页面风格严重割裂。项目已有 `next-themes`，应读取当前主题动态切换 `oneDark`/`oneLight`。

**I3：`step-5-list-diff.tsx` 的 `phase` 状态在步骤切换后不重置**

```52:55:../.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/step-5-list-diff.tsx
export function Step5ListDiff({ isActive }: Props) {
  const [phase, setPhase] = useState(0);
```

用户在 step-5 点击进入第二阶段后，跳到 step-6 再跳回来，`phase` 仍为 2，新列表已经展开，两阶段按钮的引导效果失效。需在 `isActive` 变 false 时 reset，或在变 true 时 reset。

---

#### 🟡 Minor

**M1：`_registry.ts` 中 `.then()` shim 多余**

```16:18:../.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demos/_registry.ts
"react-diff": () =>
  import("./react-diff/index").then((m) => ({ default: m.ReactDiffDemo })),
```

`index.tsx` 第 68 行已有 `export default ReactDiffDemo`，直接写 `import("./react-diff/index")` 即可，不需要 `.then` 重映射。

**M2：`useStepPlayer(6)` 硬编码步骤数，与数据源不同步**

```18:18:../.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/index.tsx
const player = useStepPlayer(6);
```

`steps` 数组在同一文件里定义，调用时已知长度。`useStepPlayer(steps.length)` 才能保证数据与控件自动对齐。目前只是巧合相等，将来修改步骤数时是两处改动。

**M3：步骤编号 `"步骤 X / 6"` 各组件硬编码**

step-1 写 `"步骤 1 / 6"`，step-3 写 `"步骤 3 / 6"`……步骤数字和总数写死在每个文件里，重新排序或增删步骤需逐一修改，且不支持英文。应由 `DemoShell` 统一注入，或由 step 组件通过 props 接收 `stepIndex`/`totalSteps`。

**M4：`KnowledgeList` 中的非空断言**

```22:23:../.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/knowledge-list.tsx
  const activeCategory = KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES.find(
    (c) => c.id === activeCategoryId
  )!;
```

`initialCategoryId = "react"` 是常量时安全，但 `setActiveCategoryId` 由 `KnowledgeSidebar.onSelect` 驱动，如果将来 category id 发生变更，这里会静默 runtime crash。建议加 fallback：`?? KNOWLEDGE_CATEGORIES[0]`。

**M5：`step-player.tsx` 不需要 `"use client"` 指令**

Hook 文件本身不需要标注 `"use client"`，客户端边界在消费它的组件上。当前标注无害，但会误导后来的维护者认为 hook 文件都要加这个。

**M6：底部进度圆点按钮缺少无障碍标签**

```129:142:../.worktrees/knowledge/components/knowledge/demo-shell.tsx
          {steps.map((_, i) => (
            <button
              key={i}
              onClick={() => goTo(i)}
              className={cn(...)}
            />
          ))}
```

纯视觉点，屏幕阅读器无法识别意图。建议加 `aria-label={`Go to step ${i + 1}`}` 和 `aria-current={i === currentStep ? "step" : undefined}`。

---

### 评估：可以合并吗？

**❌ 暂不建议合并，须先修复 C1 + I2。**

| 优先级 | 问题 | 状态 |
|--------|------|------|
| C1 | 步骤内容中文硬编码，英文路由不可用 | 必须修复 |
| C2 | `direction` prop 缺失，spec 指定特性未实现 | 修复或在 PR 描述中明确记录延期 |
| I1 | animate.css 全局导入影响所有页面 | 强烈建议修复 |
| I2 | 深色模式代码块显示异常 | 必须修复 |
| I3 | step-5 phase 不重置 | 修复体验 |
| M1–M6 | 细节优化 | 可在后续 PR 处理 |

C2 如果明确记录为"动画方向反向计划在下个迭代加入"，可接受不修复。C1 和 I2 是直接影响用户可见功能（英文版完全破损 + 深色模式视觉异常）的问题，须在合并前修复。

---
